input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.3.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.3.5
            TITLE: the fuel system must have a provision for emptying the fuel tank if required.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.3.5: The Fuel System must have a provision for emptying the Fuel Tank if required.
IC.5.3.5 The Fuel System must have a provision for emptying the Fuel Tank if required.

final_answer: The Fuel System must have a provision for emptying the Fuel Tank if required.
